headline: Top Stock Reports for Oracle, T-Mobile & Gilead
summary: Oracle's cloud infrastructure revenue jumped 84% in fiscal Q3 as AI and multicloud demand surged, though heavy data-center investments pushed trailing free cash flow to -$13.2B.

raw.headline: Top Stock Reports for Oracle, T-Mobile & Gilead
raw.summary: Oracle's cloud infrastructure revenue jumped 84% in fiscal Q3 as AI and multicloud demand surged, though heavy data-center investments pushed trailing free cash flow to -$13.2B.

headline: Asia-Pacific markets tumble as investors brace for a prolonged war in Middle East
summary: Iran's new Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei said in a late Thursday speech that the Strait of Hormuz, a vital artery for global oil trade, should remain shut.

headline: 12-Week War To Shave 3% Off Global GDP In A Demand Destruction Event
summary: Iran war may drive a 1B barrel oil deficit, fueling higher prices and weaker GDP. Read more macro analysis here.

headline: Piper Sandler Maintains Neutral on EOG Resources, Raises Price Target to $144
summary: Piper Sandler  analyst Mark Lear   maintains EOG Resources (NYSE:EOG) with a Neutral and raises the price target from $127 to $144.

headline: EOG Resources, Inc. (EOG) Surpasses Profit Projections with Solid Output and Rising Gas Prices
summary: EOG Resources, Inc. (NYSE:EOG) is one of the Goldman Sachs Energy Stocks: 10 Stocks to Buy. On February 25, 2026, Reuters reported that EOG Resources, Inc. (NYSE:EOG) exceeded fourth-quarter profit projections due to solid production and higher natural gas prices. The corporation produced 1.40 million barrels of oil equivalent per day in Q4, up from […]
